title: Be Different
description: Be Different is a non-profit dedicated to challenging bullying by empowering communities with knowledge, empathy, and proactive tools. The strategy outlined below will build a strong, compassionate brand identity, position the foundation as a trusted voice, and create measurable change through education, advocacy, and community engagement.
